humanReadable.title: Bethune House — Migrant Women's Refuge Intake Eligibility
humanReadable.description: Confirms a female foreign domestic worker in Hong Kong is in active distress (homeless, jobless, abused, or pursuing a legal case) per a partner-NGO assessor. Used to gate temporary shelter intake without disclosing identity.
humanReadable.issuingOrg: Bethune House (under Mission for Migrant Workers, founded 1986; ~25-30 women per shelter, ~680 women per year served)
humanReadable.averageStay: 2 weeks – 2 months; some over a year

_note: Smaller minAnonymitySet (50 vs 100 for HELP) reflects the narrower eligibility population. Per threat model section 1h, policies with low k-anonymity require additional review before deployment.
